scripts.build: npm run build -w @olow/types && npm run build -w @olow/memory && npm run build -w @olow/engine && npm run build -w @olow/templates && npm run build -w @olow/messengers && npm run build -w @olow/flows && npm run build -w olow-chatbot
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @olow/types && npm run typecheck -w @olow/memory && npm run typecheck -w @olow/engine && npm run typecheck -w @olow/templates && npm run typecheck -w @olow/messengers && npm run typecheck -w @olow/flows && npm run typecheck -w olow-chatbot
